scripts.lint:agent: cd agent && uv run ruff check .
scripts.typecheck:agent: cd agent && uv run mypy src
scripts.check: pnpm check:docs && pnpm check:deployment && pnpm lint:contracts && pnpm lint:controller && pnpm test:controller && pnpm build:controller && pnpm test:agent && pnpm lint:agent && pnpm typecheck:agent
